text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Shakur! Can you think of anything<n>that
rhymes with peas?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The hell did that come from?<n>...And come
on, you think I'd fall for<n>that?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Aw, it didn't work. I've been trying to<n>figure out
how to make you smile.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Someone of your royal standing<n>shouldn't be
wasting their time trying to<n>amuse me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But I know you actually smile a lot.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've seen it loads of times. When you<n>solve a
difficult equation or look at<n>data, you smile.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That... That's what people call a wicked<n>smile. It's
not the kinda look you go out<n>of your way to try
and see.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Really? It feels more like an<n>accomplished smile
to me. And<n>considering I've seen lots of smiles
from<n>all around the world, I'd say you can<n>trust my
opinion! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I know, maybe you'll get pulled in if I<n>start
laughing. Here goes! Ahahahahaaa!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Did you seriously think that would<n>work?! Of all
the—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. Bring me a tough number puzzlefirst and then we can talk.
